input_params.Spans_DeltaPdBIntLeft: Difference between the power of the signal of the central channel and the channel immediately to the left.
input_params.Spans_ModFormatIntLeft: Modulation of the channel immediately to the left.
input_params.Spans_DeltaPdBIntRight: Difference between the power of the signal of the central channel and the channel immediately to the right.
input_params.Spans_ModFormatIntRight: Modulation of the channel immediately to the right.

outputs_params.OSNRdB_NL: optical signal-to-noise ratio with NLIN interference
outputs_params.BER_NL: Bit error rate with NLIN interference
